text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Now this here is a batch of pickled
radishes.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I've always been so fond of these. I have a mash
back at the dorm I use to make them.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
When I served them up for dinner once, the
crunchy little things became the talk of the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I meant to make plenty enough to go around, but
lately I always seem to find myself running low.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
They're all growing girls, I suppose. We wouldn't
want anyone going hungry, so I'll be making a
mountain of pickles today!
